body:
Hey, just a heads up — I noticed you forgot to update the shared status doc again this week. I know you've been slammed with the product launch stuff, but Marcus mentioned it in the standup and it was a little awkward.

Can you try to knock it out before EOD tomorrow? I think he checks it first thing Friday morning.
snippet: Hey, just a heads up — I noticed you forgot to update the shared status doc agai...
subject: weekly status doc reminder

body:
Ugh, you're right, I completely spaced. Thanks for the nudge — and sorry you had to deal with that in standup, that's embarrassing.

I just updated it now. Added the campaign metrics and the vendor call summary. Should be good through the end of the week. I'm setting a Thursday afternoon reminder on my phone so this doesn't happen again.

Heather
snippet: Ugh, you're right, I completely spaced. Thanks for the nudge — and sorry you had...
subject: Re: weekly status doc reminder

body:
Hey! Are you free for lunch any day this week? I was thinking we could try that new ramen place on Clement Street everyone keeps talking about. I'm pretty flexible Thursday or Friday.

Let me know what works for you!

Leo
snippet: Hey! Are you free for lunch any day this week? I was thinking we could try that ...
subject: Lunch this week?

body:
Oh yes, I've been wanting to try that place forever! Thursday doesn't work for me — I have a 1pm call that always runs long. But Friday I'm totally free, could do anytime after noon.

Should we meet there or do you want to walk over together from your place?

Heather
snippet: Oh yes, I've been wanting to try that place forever! Thursday doesn't work for m...
subject: Re: Lunch this week?

body:
Friday works perfectly! Let's say 12:30? I can just meet you there since I have an errand to run in the morning on that side of town anyway.

Also heads up the reviews say it gets crowded, so maybe we should go a little early — like 12:15? Up to you.

Leo
snippet: Friday works perfectly! Let's say 12:30? I can just meet you there since I have ...
subject: Re: Lunch this week?

body:
Hey Heather, hope your morning is going well! I've been working on the new layout for the GreenRider landing page and I think I'm finally happy with it, but I'd love a second pair of eyes before I send it to the team.

Could you take a look sometime today or tomorrow? I know you have a good eye for this stuff and I trust your feedback more than anyone else's on the team honestly.

I'll send over the Figma link once you give me the green light. No rush, just let me know!

— Leo
snippet: Hey Heather, hope your morning is going well! I've been working on the new layou...
subject: Quick design review request

body:
Of course! Send it over whenever you're ready. I have a meeting until noon but I can look at it this afternoon.

Just a heads up — I'll be honest if something feels off, so don't be mad at me lol. You know how I get when the spacing is wrong.

— Heather
snippet: Of course! Send it over whenever you're ready. I have a meeting until noon but I...
subject: Re: Quick design review request

body:
Ha, I am fully prepared for the brutal feedback. Here's the link: figma.com/file/greenrider-landing-v3

Main things I'm unsure about are the hero section font size and whether the CTA button color is too aggressive. Also the mobile breakpoint feels a little cramped to me but I couldn't figure out how to fix it without breaking the desktop layout.

Take your time, no pressure!

— Leo
snippet: Ha, I am fully prepared for the brutal feedback. Here's the link: figma.com/file...
subject: Re: Quick design review request

body:
Okay I looked through it and honestly it's really good! The hero font size is fine, maybe bump it up 2px max but it's not a big deal. Agreed on the CTA button — the green is a little loud. Maybe try the darker shade from the brand palette, like the one used in the footer nav?

For mobile, I think you just need to reduce the padding on the hero section container. It's colliding with the nav on smaller screens. Should be a quick fix.

Overall though, send it. The team is going to love it. Good work babe.

— Heather
snippet: Okay I looked through it and honestly it's really good! The hero font size is fi...
subject: Re: Quick design review request

body:
Hey! So I was thinking we leave Friday after you get off work — maybe around 6? That way we beat most of the traffic heading up to the cabin.

I can handle packing the cooler and picking up snacks on my way to yours. Can you double-check that the cabin has enough blankets? Last time it got cold and I don't want a repeat of that.

Let me know if Friday works or if you'd rather push to Saturday morning. Either way I'm flexible.

Leo
snippet: Hey! So I was thinking we leave Friday after you get off work — maybe around 6? ...
subject: Weekend trip plan

body:
Friday at 6 works perfectly! I'll probably be home by 5:30 so that gives me a bit of time to throw my bag together.

I checked the cabin listing and it says there are extra blankets in the hall closet, so we should be fine. I'll also grab some firewood from the place near my office — they sell it by the bundle and it's way cheaper than stopping at a gas station on the way.

Can you add coffee to the snack list? I completely forgot to buy some and I cannot function without it in the morning.

Heather
snippet: Friday at 6 works perfectly! I'll probably be home by 5:30 so that gives me a bi...
subject: Re: Weekend trip plan

body:
Coffee is already on the list, don't worry. I got us that dark roast you liked last time.

One thing — I just checked the weather and it looks like Saturday morning might have some rain. Should be clear by noon though. Might be a good excuse to just stay in and play board games until it passes. I'm thinking we pack Catan.

Also, are we okay on gas or do you want me to fill up before I come over?

Leo
snippet: Coffee is already on the list, don't worry. I got us that dark roast you liked l...
subject: Re: Weekend trip plan

body:
Rain + Catan sounds like an ideal morning honestly. Bring it.

You can fill up on the way — there's a cheap station just off the highway exit anyway, we can stop there. I'll send you the pin for the cabin keypad too, I think the code changed since last time.

Oh and my sister asked if we could swing by and grab her hiking poles since she left them up there last month. It's not out of the way at all, just a quick stop. That okay?

Heather
snippet:
Rain + Catan sounds like an ideal morning honestly. Bring it.

You can fill up o...
subject: Re: Weekend trip plan

body:
No problem grabbing the poles, just text me her address and I'll put it in the route.

I'm actually getting excited now — feels like we haven't had a proper trip in forever. I'll be at yours around 6:15 at the latest. Send that keypad code when you get a chance so I have it saved.

See you Friday!

Leo
snippet: No problem grabbing the poles, just text me her address and I'll put it in the r...
subject: Re: Weekend trip plan

body:
Hey Heather, just wanted to give you a heads up — I got a notification that your GreenRider membership is coming up for renewal next week. I think it auto-renews on the 8th. Did you want to keep it going or were you thinking of cancelling? I know you mentioned last month you weren't riding as much lately.

Let me know if you want me to check the account details. I still have the login if you need it.

Leo
snippet: Hey Heather, just wanted to give you a heads up — I got a notification that your...
subject: Service renewal reminder

body:
Thanks for the reminder! Honestly I keep going back and forth on it. I haven't used it nearly as much this spring, but I feel like I'll regret cancelling once the weather gets better.

I'll just let it renew for now and actually try to use it more this summer. Maybe we can do that trail ride you mentioned a few weeks ago — that'd help justify it at least.

Heather
snippet: Thanks for the reminder! Honestly I keep going back and forth on it. I haven't u...
subject: Re: Service renewal reminder

body:
Hey, saw you mentioned the auth cutover is happening this weekend. Do you have the runbook finalized yet? I want to make sure I'm not blocking anything on my end before I head out Friday afternoon.

Also — are we still doing the rollback window until Sunday midnight or did that change? Last I heard Marcus was pushing to extend it through Monday morning given the EU traffic patterns.
snippet: Hey, saw you mentioned the auth cutover is happening this weekend. Do you have t...
subject: auth cutover plan

body:
Runbook is done, I sent it to the channel this morning — check #infra-deploys. Rollback window got extended to Monday 6am, Marcus won the argument on that one. Honestly I think it's the right call.

You're not blocking anything, we just need the legacy token service to stay up through Saturday. As long as you don't touch the OAuth config before the cutover fires at 2am Saturday, we're good.

I'll be on call all weekend so ping me if anything looks weird on your end.
snippet: Runbook is done, I sent it to the channel this morning — check #infra-deploys. R...
subject: Re: auth cutover plan

body:
Found it, thanks. I'll keep hands off the OAuth config — promise. I'll leave a note for myself so I don't accidentally fat-finger anything Friday when I'm rushing to wrap up.

Good luck Saturday night. I'll stay up with you if it runs long — I can at least bring snacks and moral support. Let me know if you want me to come over around 1am.
snippet: Found it, thanks. I'll keep hands off the OAuth config — promise. I'll leave a n...
subject: Re: auth cutover plan
